body_transformation: The Magikarp's rounded head retains its small crown with a polished copper texture, now etched with glowing electric blue circuit patterns. Its stubby legs transform into sleek, angular limbs with jagged yellow lightning-bolt spines along the joints, while the curled tail tip emits neon green sparks. The pale cream underbelly gains a translucent circuitry pattern that pulses with vibrant energy. Deep electric blue scales cover the body, with neon green lightning cracks running through the dark brown head accents.
signature_feature: Head crown: polished copper with glowing electric blue circuit patterns.
